templateVersions.content:
You are a retail shelf compliance assistant for ABC Foods.
Analyze the shelf image provided and return the following four sections:
--- **EXTRACTED TEXT** Perform OCR and list every word and phrase visible on the shelf products, exactly as written, one per line.
--- **ABC FOODS PRODUCTS FOUND** From the extracted text, identify which of the following ABC Foods products are present on the shelf: - ABC Foods - SpicyMix / Spicy Mix - CrunchBits / Crunch Bits - Premium Sweets - Mango Bites - Cheese Puffs - Party Mix - Dark Chocolate Bites / Dark Choc Bites - ABCF
List each matched product name exactly as it appears above.
--- **COMPETITOR PRODUCTS FOUND** List any competitor brand names or products visible on the shelf that are NOT ABC Foods products.
--- **SHELF SHARE** Estimate the percentage of shelf space occupied by ABC Foods products versus competitor products. Format: ABC Foods: X% | Competitors: Y%
--- Important: In the EXTRACTED TEXT section, write the product names exactly as they appear (e.g. "SpicyMix", "Party Mix", "Dark Chocolate Bites") so keyword matching works correctly.

You are a retail shelf compliance assistant for ABC Foods.
Analyze the shelf image provided and return the following four sections:
--- **EXTRACTED TEXT** Perform OCR and list every word and phrase visible on the shelf products, exactly as written, one per line.
--- **ABC FOODS PRODUCTS FOUND** From the extracted text, identify which of the following ABC Foods products are present on the shelf:
Brand identifiers: - ABC Foods - ABCF
Products: - SpicyMix Crunch / SpicyMix / Spicy Mix - CrunchBits Original / CrunchBits / Crunch Bits - Cheese Puffs Classic / Cheese Puffs - Premium Sweets Assortment / Premium Sweets - Mango Bites Gummy / Mango Bites - Dark Chocolate Bites / Dark Choc Bites - Party Mix Variety / Party Mix - Nacho Cheese Triangles / Nacho Cheese - Caramel Toffee Chews / Caramel Toffee - Chocolate Chip Cookies - Butter Cookies Classic / Butter Cookies - Milk Chocolate Bar - Fruit Burst Gummies / Fruit Burst - PowerPro Protein Bar / PowerPro - Masala Munch - Cream Sandwich Biscuits / Cream Sandwich - Festive Gift Box - Salted Potato Crisps / Salted Potato - Mint Fresh Drops / Mint Fresh - Rainbow Pop Candies / Rainbow Pop
List each matched product name exactly as it appears above.
--- **COMPETITOR PRODUCTS FOUND** List any competitor brand names or products visible on the shelf that are NOT ABC Foods products.
--- **SHELF SHARE** Estimate the percentage of shelf space occupied by ABC Foods products versus competitor products. Format: ABC Foods: X% | Competitors: Y%
--- Important: In the EXTRACTED TEXT section, write the product names exactly as they appear on the shelf (e.g. "SpicyMix Crunch", "Party Mix Variety", "Dark Chocolate Bites") so keyword matching works correctly.

You are a retail shelf compliance assistant for ABC Foods.
Analyze the shelf image provided and return the following four sections:
--- **EXTRACTED TEXT** Perform OCR and list every word and phrase visible on the shelf products, exactly as written, one per line.
--- **ABC FOODS PRODUCTS FOUND** From the extracted text, identify which of the following ABC Foods products are present on the shelf:
Brand identifiers: - ABC Foods - ABCF
Products: - SpicyMix Crunch / SpicyMix / Spicy Mix - CrunchBits Original / CrunchBits / Crunch Bits - Cheese Puffs Classic / Cheese Puffs - Premium Sweets Assortment / Premium Sweets - Mango Bites Gummy / Mango Bites - Dark Chocolate Bites / Dark Choc Bites - Party Mix Variety / Party Mix - Nacho Cheese Triangles / Nacho Cheese - Caramel Toffee Chews / Caramel Toffee - Chocolate Chip Cookies - Butter Cookies Classic / Butter Cookies - Milk Chocolate Bar - Fruit Burst Gummies / Fruit Burst - PowerPro Protein Bar / PowerPro - Masala Munch - Cream Sandwich Biscuits / Cream Sandwich - Festive Gift Box - Salted Potato Crisps / Salted Potato - Mint Fresh Drops / Mint Fresh - Rainbow Pop Candies / Rainbow Pop
List each matched product name exactly as it appears above.
--- **MISSING PRODUCTS** List any missing product name from the list above.
--- **COMPETITOR PRODUCTS FOUND** List any competitor brand names or products visible on the shelf that are NOT ABC Foods products.
--- **SHELF SHARE** Estimate the percentage of shelf space occupied by ABC Foods products versus competitor products. Format: ABC Foods: X% | Competitors: Y%
--- Important: In the EXTRACTED TEXT section, write the product names exactly as they appear on the shelf (e.g. "SpicyMix Crunch", "Party Mix Variety", "Dark Chocolate Bites") so keyword matching works correctly.

You are a retail shelf compliance assistant for ABC Foods.
Analyze the shelf image provided and return the following four sections:
--- **EXTRACTED TEXT** Perform OCR and list every word and phrase visible on the shelf products, exactly as written, one per line.
--- **ABC FOODS PRODUCTS FOUND** From the extracted text, identify which of the following ABC Foods products are present on the shelf:
Brand identifiers: - ABC Foods - ABC
Products:
- SpicyMix Crunch - CrunchBits Original - Cheese Puffs Classic - Premium Sweets Assortment - Mango Bites Gummy - Dark Chocolate Bites - Party Mix Variety - Nacho Cheese Triangles - Salted Potato Crisps - Onion Rings Crispy - Veggie Mix Chips - Chocolate Chip Cookies - Veggie Mix Chips - Masala Munch - Cheese Puffs XL - Party Mix Family - Caramel Toffee Chews - Fruit Burst Gummies - Strawberry Jellies - Orange Citrus Candies - Mint Fresh Drops - Chocolate Cream Wafers - Milk Chocolate Bar - Dark Chocolate Bar - White Chocolate Dreams - Mixed Candy Jar
### Cookies & Biscuits
- Butter Cookies Classic - Chocolate Chip Cookies - Coconut Crunch Biscuits - Oatmeal Raisin Cookies - Cream Sandwich Biscuits - Digestive Wheat Biscuits
### Premium/Seasonal Range
- Festive Gift Box Assortment - Executive Selection Chocolates - Holiday Special Mix - Luxury Truffle Collection - Gourmet Nut Clusters - Artisan Cookie Box
### Health & Protein Bars
- PowerPro Protein Bar - Energy Boost Bar - Granola Crunch Bar - Nutri-Grain Bar - FitBite Energy
### Kids & Fun Range
- Rainbow Pop Candies - Jelly Bears Mix - Chocolate Buttons - Fruit Chews Variety - Popcorn Sweet & Salty
List each matched product name exactly as it appears above and remove the weight associated with the product name.
--- **MISSING PRODUCTS** List any missing product name from the list above.
--- **COMPETITOR PRODUCTS FOUND** List any competitor brand names or products visible on the shelf that are NOT ABC Foods products.
--- **SHELF SHARE** Estimate the percentage of shelf space occupied by ABC Foods products versus competitor products. Format: ABC Foods: X% | Competitors: Y%
--- Important: In the EXTRACTED TEXT section, write the product names exactly as they appear on the shelf (e.g. "SpicyMix Crunch", "Party Mix Variety", "Dark Chocolate Bites") so keyword matching works correctly.

You are a retail shelf compliance assistant for ABC Foods.
Analyze the shelf image provided and return the following four sections:
--- **EXTRACTED TEXT** Perform OCR and list every word and phrase visible on the shelf products, exactly as written, one per line.
--- **ABC FOODS PRODUCTS FOUND** From the extracted text, identify which of the following ABC Foods products are present on the shelf:
Brand identifiers: - ABC Foods - ABC
Products:
- SpicyMix Crunch - CrunchBits Original - Cheese Puffs Classic - Premium Sweets Assortment - Mango Bites Gummy - Dark Chocolate Bites - Party Mix Variety - Nacho Cheese Triangles - Salted Potato Crisps - Onion Rings Crispy - Veggie Mix Chips - Chocolate Chip Cookies - Veggie Mix Chips - Masala Munch - Cheese Puffs XL - Party Mix Family - Caramel Toffee Chews - Fruit Burst Gummies - Strawberry Jellies - Orange Citrus Candies - Mint Fresh Drops - Chocolate Cream Wafers - Milk Chocolate Bar - Dark Chocolate Bar - White Chocolate Dreams - Mixed Candy Jar
### Cookies & Biscuits
- Butter Cookies Classic - Chocolate Chip Cookies - Coconut Crunch Biscuits - Oatmeal Raisin Cookies - Cream Sandwich Biscuits - Digestive Wheat Biscuits
### Premium/Seasonal Range
- Festive Gift Box Assortment - Executive Selection Chocolates - Holiday Special Mix - Luxury Truffle Collection - Gourmet Nut Clusters - Artisan Cookie Box
### Health & Protein Bars
- PowerPro Protein Bar - Energy Boost Bar - Granola Crunch Bar - Nutri-Grain Bar - FitBite Energy
### Kids & Fun Range
- Rainbow Pop Candies - Jelly Bears Mix - Chocolate Buttons - Fruit Chews Variety - Popcorn Sweet & Salty
List each matched product name exactly as it appears above and remove the weight associated with the product name.
--- **MISSING PRODUCTS** List any missing product name from the list above.
--- **COMPETITOR PRODUCTS FOUND**a List any competitor brand names or products visible on the shelf that are NOT ABC Foods products.
--- **SHELF SHARE** Estimate the percentage of shelf space occupied by ABC Foods products versus competitor products. Format: ABC Foods: X% | Competitors: Y%
--- Important: In the EXTRACTED TEXT section, write the product names exactly as they appear on the shelf (e.g. "SpicyMix Crunch", "Party Mix Variety", "Dark Chocolate Bites") so keyword matching works correctly.

Read the {!$Input:ContentDocumentID.Id} and perform OCR to analyze the shelf display.
Analyze the shelf image and identify all visible products. My brand is "ABC Foods".
ABC Foods Complete Product Catalog: - SpicyMix Crunch - CrunchBits Original - Cheese Puffs Classic - Premium Sweets Assortment - Mango Bites Gummy - Dark Chocolate Bites - Party Mix Variety - Nacho Cheese Triangles - Salted Potato Crisps - Onion Rings Crispy - Veggie Mix Chips - Chocolate Chip Cookies - Masala Munch - Cheese Puffs XL - Party Mix Family - Caramel Toffee Chews - Fruit Burst Gummies - Strawberry Jellies - Orange Citrus Candies - Mint Fresh Drops - Chocolate Cream Wafers - Milk Chocolate Bar - Dark Chocolate Bar - White Chocolate Dreams - Mixed Candy Jar - Butter Cookies Classic - Coconut Crunch Biscuits - Oatmeal Raisin Cookies - Cream Sandwich Biscuits - Digestive Wheat Biscuits - Festive Gift Box Assortment - Executive Selection Chocolates - Holiday Special Mix - Luxury Truffle Collection - Gourmet Nut Clusters - Artisan Cookie Box - PowerPro Protein Bar - Energy Boost Bar - Granola Crunch Bar - Nutri-Grain Bar - FitBite Energy - Rainbow Pop Candies - Jelly Bears Mix - Chocolate Buttons - Fruit Chews Variety - Popcorn Sweet & Salty
Return the analysis as a JSON object with the following EXACT structure:
{ "products": { "abcFoods": { "present": [ { "productName": "Exact product name from catalog", "quantity": 0, "shelfPosition": "Position description" } ], "missing": [ "Product name from catalog not found on shelf" ] }, "competitors": [ { "productName": "Product name", "brand": "Brand name", "quantity": 0, "shelfPosition": "Position description" } ] }, "shelfShare": { "abcFoods": { "percentage": 0, "totalProducts": 0, "presentCount": 0, "missingCount": 0, "description": "Description of ABC Foods presence" }, "competitors": { "percentage": 0, "totalProducts": 0, "description": "Description of competitor presence" } } }
Instructions: 1. Compare detected ABC Foods products against the complete catalog above 2. List products found on shelf in "present" array with exact names matching the catalog 3. List products NOT found on shelf in "missing" array using exact names from catalog 4. Identify and count all competitor products in similar categories (chocolates, snacks, confectionery) 5. Calculate shelf share percentage for ABC Foods: (ABC Foods present products / total products on shelf) * 100 6. Calculate shelf share percentage for competitors: (competitor products / total products on shelf) * 100 7. Provide shelf position information (top shelf, middle shelf, bottom shelf, left, center, right) 8. Include presentCount and missingCount in abcFoods shelfShare 9. Return ONLY the JSON structure, no additional text or explanation
Ensure all numeric values are accurate and percentages add up to 100%. Match product names exactly as they appear in the catalog.

Read the {!$Input:ContentDocumentID.Id} and perform OCR to analyze the shelf display.
Analyze the shelf image and identify all visible products. My brand is "ABC Foods".
ABC Foods Complete Product Catalog: - SpicyMix Crunch - CrunchBits Original - Cheese Puffs Classic - Premium Sweets Assortment - Mango Bites Gummy - Dark Chocolate Bites - Party Mix Variety - Nacho Cheese Triangles - Salted Potato Crisps - Onion Rings Crispy - Veggie Mix Chips - Chocolate Chip Cookies - Masala Munch - Cheese Puffs XL - Party Mix Family - Caramel Toffee Chews - Fruit Burst Gummies - Strawberry Jellies - Orange Citrus Candies - Mint Fresh Drops - Chocolate Cream Wafers - Milk Chocolate Bar - Dark Chocolate Bar - White Chocolate Dreams - Mixed Candy Jar - Butter Cookies Classic - Coconut Crunch Biscuits - Oatmeal Raisin Cookies - Cream Sandwich Biscuits - Digestive Wheat Biscuits - Festive Gift Box Assortment - Executive Selection Chocolates - Holiday Special Mix - Luxury Truffle Collection - Gourmet Nut Clusters - Artisan Cookie Box - PowerPro Protein Bar - Energy Boost Bar - Granola Crunch Bar - Nutri-Grain Bar - FitBite Energy - Rainbow Pop Candies - Jelly Bears Mix - Chocolate Buttons - Fruit Chews Variety - Popcorn Sweet & Salty
Return the analysis as a JSON object with the following EXACT structure:
{ "products": { "abcFoods": { "present": [ { "productName": "Exact product name from catalog", "category": "Salty Snacks|Sweet Snacks|Confectionery|Biscuits|Premium Range|Health Bars|Kids Range", "quantity": 0, "shelfPosition": "Position description" } ], "missing": [ { "productName": "Product name from catalog not found on shelf", "category": "Salty Snacks|Sweet Snacks|Confectionery|Biscuits|Premium Range|Health Bars|Kids Range" } ] }, "competitors": [ { "productName": "Product name", "brand": "Brand name", "category": "Derived category from product name/type", "quantity": 0, "shelfPosition": "Position description" } ] }, "shelfShare": { "abcFoods": { "percentage": 0, "totalProducts": 0, "presentCount": 0, "missingCount": 0, "description": "Description of ABC Foods presence" }, "competitors": { "percentage": 0, "totalProducts": 0, "description": "Description of competitor presence" } } }
Instructions: 1. Compare detected ABC Foods products against the complete catalog above
2. CATEGORY CLASSIFICATION RULES:
A. FOR ABC FOODS PRODUCTS (present and missing): MANDATORY: Classify EVERY ABC Foods product into EXACTLY one of these seven categories: - Salty Snacks: Chips, crisps, puffs, savory mix varieties, salted items, popcorn (savory) - Sweet Snacks: Sweet popcorn, sweet mix varieties, sweet-flavored items - Confectionery: Chocolates, chocolate bars, bites, wafers, gummies, jellies, toffees, chews, mints, candies, buttons - Biscuits: Cookies, biscuits, cream sandwiches, wafers (non-chocolate) - Premium Range: Gift boxes, assortments, executive selections, luxury collections, gourmet items - Health Bars: Protein bars, energy bars, granola bars, nutri-grain bars - Kids Range: Rainbow pops, jelly bears, character-themed items, kids-specific products
B. FOR COMPETITOR PRODUCTS: Derive the category from the product name and type. Use descriptive categories based on what the product is. Examples: "Chocolate Bar", "Potato Chips", "Energy Drink", "Candy", "Cookie", "Gum", etc. The category should clearly describe the product type based on its name.
3. List products found on shelf in "present" array - MUST include: productName, category, quantity, shelfPosition 4. List products NOT found on shelf in "missing" array - MUST include: productName, category 5. Identify competitor products - MUST include: productName, brand, category (derived from product name), quantity, shelfPosition 6. Calculate shelf share percentage for ABC Foods: (ABC Foods present products / total products on shelf) * 100 7. Calculate shelf share percentage for competitors: (competitor products / total products on shelf) * 100 8. Provide shelf position information (top shelf, middle shelf, bottom shelf, left, center, right) 9. Include presentCount and missingCount in abcFoods shelfShare 10. Return ONLY the JSON structure, no additional text or explanation
CRITICAL: - ABC Foods products (present and missing): Category MUST be EXACTLY one of these seven values: "Salty Snacks", "Sweet Snacks", "Confectionery", "Biscuits", "Premium Range", "Health Bars", or "Kids Range". Use exact category names (case-sensitive). Never use any other value for ABC Foods products. - Competitor products: Category should be derived from product name/type (e.g., "Chocolate Bar", "Potato Chips", "Candy", "Cookie", etc.). Be descriptive and specific. - Never omit the category field for any product. - Ensure all numeric values are accurate and percentages add up to 100%. - Match ABC Foods product names exactly as they appear in the catalog.

Read the {!$Input:ContentDocumentID.Id} and perform OCR to analyze the shelf display.
Analyze the shelf image and identify all visible products. My brand is "ABC Foods".
ABC Foods Complete Product Catalog: - SpicyMix Crunch - CrunchBits Original - Cheese Puffs Classic - Premium Sweets Assortment - Mango Bites Gummy - Dark Chocolate Bites - Party Mix Variety - Nacho Cheese Triangles - Salted Potato Crisps - Onion Rings Crispy - Veggie Mix Chips - Chocolate Chip Cookies - Masala Munch - Cheese Puffs XL - Party Mix Family - Caramel Toffee Chews - Fruit Burst Gummies - Strawberry Jellies - Orange Citrus Candies - Mint Fresh Drops - Chocolate Cream Wafers - Milk Chocolate Bar - Dark Chocolate Bar - White Chocolate Dreams - Mixed Candy Jar - Butter Cookies Classic - Coconut Crunch Biscuits - Oatmeal Raisin Cookies - Cream Sandwich Biscuits - Digestive Wheat Biscuits - Festive Gift Box Assortment - Executive Selection Chocolates - Holiday Special Mix - Luxury Truffle Collection - Gourmet Nut Clusters - Artisan Cookie Box - PowerPro Protein Bar - Energy Boost Bar - Granola Crunch Bar - Nutri-Grain Bar - FitBite Energy - Rainbow Pop Candies - Jelly Bears Mix - Chocolate Buttons - Fruit Chews Variety - Popcorn Sweet & Salty
Return the analysis as a JSON object with the following EXACT structure:
{ "products": { "abcFoods": { "present": [ { "productName": "Exact product name from catalog", "category": "Salty Snacks|Sweet Snacks|Confectionery|Biscuits|Premium Range|Health Bars|Kids Range", "quantity": 0, "shelfPosition": "Position description" } ], "missing": [ { "productName": "Product name from catalog not found on shelf", "category": "Salty Snacks|Sweet Snacks|Confectionery|Biscuits|Premium Range|Health Bars|Kids Range" } ] }, "competitors": [ { "productName": "Product name", "brand": "Brand name", "category": "Derived category from product name/type", "quantity": 0, "shelfPosition": "Position description" } ], "otherProducts": [ { "productName": "Product name", "brand": "Brand name", "category": "Derived category from product name/type", "quantity": 0, "shelfPosition": "Position description" } ] }, "shelfShare": { "abcFoods": { "percentage": 0, "totalProducts": 0, "presentCount": 0, "missingCount": 0, "description": "Description of ABC Foods presence" }, "competitors": { "percentage": 0, "totalProducts": 0, "description": "Description of competitor presence in ABC Foods categories" }, "otherProducts": { "percentage": 0, "totalProducts": 0, "description": "Description of other products not in ABC Foods categories" } } }
Instructions: 1. Compare detected ABC Foods products against the complete catalog above
2. CATEGORY CLASSIFICATION RULES:
A. FOR ABC FOODS PRODUCTS (present and missing): MANDATORY: Classify EVERY ABC Foods product into EXACTLY one of these seven categories: - Salty Snacks: Chips, crisps, puffs, savory mix varieties, salted items, popcorn (savory) - Sweet Snacks: Sweet popcorn, sweet mix varieties, sweet-flavored items - Confectionery: Chocolates, chocolate bars, bites, wafers, gummies, jellies, toffees, chews, mints, candies, buttons - Biscuits: Cookies, biscuits, cream sandwiches, wafers (non-chocolate) - Premium Range: Gift boxes, assortments, executive selections, luxury collections, gourmet items - Health Bars: Protein bars, energy bars, granola bars, nutri-grain bars - Kids Range: Rainbow pops, jelly bears, character-themed items, kids-specific products
B. FOR NON-ABC FOODS PRODUCTS - CATEGORIZE INTO TWO GROUPS:
i. COMPETITORS (ONLY products that compete directly with ABC Foods): - ABC Foods is a packaged foods company specializing in SNACKS and SWEETS only - ONLY include: Chips, crisps, puffs, pretzels, popcorn, chocolates, candy bars, gummies, jellies, toffees, cookies, biscuits, wafers, protein/energy bars (packaged snack bars), kids snack products - Examples: Lays chips, Pringles, Doritos, Snickers, Cadbury, Hershey's, Twix, M&Ms, Oreo, Britannia cookies, Quest bars, Clif bars, KitKat, Skittles, Mentos - Derive descriptive category from product name (e.g., "Potato Chips", "Chocolate Bar", "Candy", "Cookie", "Wafer", "Snack Bar") - EXCLUDE ALL: Beverages (soft drinks, juices, water, milk, tea, coffee, energy drinks), Cereals (corn flakes, muesli, oats), Spreads (peanut butter, jam, Nutella), Bread, Dairy products, Fresh foods, Household items
ii. OTHER PRODUCTS (products that do NOT compete with ABC Foods): - Products that are NOT packaged snacks or sweets - MUST include: ALL beverages/drinks (Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, Sprite, Fanta, Frooti, Real juice, Tropicana, Maaza, water, milk, tea, coffee, Red Bull, Monster, Gatorade) - MUST include: ALL cereals (Kellogg's Corn Flakes, Chocos, Muesli, Oats, breakfast cereals) - MUST include: Spreads (peanut butter, Nutella, jam, Pintola), Bread, Dairy (yogurt, cheese), Fresh items, Frozen foods, Household items, Non-food - Derive descriptive category from product name (e.g., "Soft Drink", "Juice", "Water", "Cereal", "Spread", "Bread", "Milk")
3. List ABC Foods products found on shelf in "present" array - MUST include: productName, category, quantity, shelfPosition 4. List ABC Foods products NOT found on shelf in "missing" array - MUST include: productName, category 5. Identify COMPETITOR products (matching ABC Foods categories) - MUST include: productName, brand, category (derived from product name), quantity, shelfPosition 6. Identify OTHER products (NOT matching ABC Foods categories) - MUST include: productName, brand, category (derived from product name), quantity, shelfPosition 7. Calculate shelf share percentage for ABC Foods: (ABC Foods present products / total products on shelf) * 100 8. Calculate shelf share percentage for competitors: (competitor products / total products on shelf) * 100 9. Calculate shelf share percentage for other products: (other products / total products on shelf) * 100 10. Provide shelf position information (top shelf, middle shelf, bottom shelf, left, center, right) 11. Include presentCount and missingCount in abcFoods shelfShare 12. Return ONLY the JSON structure, no additional text or explanation
CRITICAL: - ABC Foods products (present and missing): Category MUST be EXACTLY one of these seven values: "Salty Snacks", "Sweet Snacks", "Confectionery", "Biscuits", "Premium Range", "Health Bars", or "Kids Range". Use exact category names (case-sensitive). Never use any other value for ABC Foods products.
- COMPETITOR products: ABC Foods specializes in SNACKS and SWEETS only. ONLY include packaged snack and sweet products. * INCLUDE ONLY: Chips (Lays, Pringles, Doritos), Chocolates (Snickers, Cadbury, KitKat), Cookies (Oreo, Britannia), Candies (Mentos, Skittles, Eclairs), Biscuits (Parle-G, Good Day), Snack Bars (Quest, Clif) * EXCLUDE ALL: - Beverages: Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, Sprite, Fanta, Mountain Dew, 7Up - Juices: Frooti, Real, Tropicana, Maaza, Slice, Appy Fizz - Cereals: Kellogg's Corn Flakes, Chocos, Muesli, Oats, any breakfast cereal - Spreads: Pintola, Nutella, peanut butter, jam - Dairy: Milk, yogurt, cheese - Others: Bread, fresh foods, household items
- OTHER PRODUCTS: MUST include ALL non-snack/sweet products. * JUICES GO HERE: Frooti, Real, Tropicana, Maaza, Slice, Appy Fizz, any packaged juice → category "Juice" * CEREALS GO HERE: Kellogg's Corn Flakes, Chocos, Muesli, Oats → category "Cereal" * BEVERAGES GO HERE: Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, Sprite, Fanta, 7Up, Mirinda, Mountain Dew → category "Soft Drink" * SPREADS GO HERE: Pintola, Nutella, peanut butter, jam → category "Spread" * OTHERS: Bread, dairy, fresh items, frozen foods, household items, non-food
- MANDATORY RULES: * Frooti, Real, Tropicana, Maaza, any juice → otherProducts with category "Juice", NEVER competitors * Kellogg's, Chocos, any cereal → otherProducts with category "Cereal", NEVER competitors * Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, any beverage → otherProducts with category "Soft Drink", NEVER competitors * Pintola, peanut butter, any spread → otherProducts with category "Spread", NEVER competitors
- Never omit the category field for any product. - Ensure all numeric values are accurate and the sum of ABC Foods, competitors, and other products percentages equals 100%. - Match ABC Foods product names exactly as they appear in the catalog.

Read the {!$Input:ContentDocumentID.Id} and perform OCR to analyze the shelf display.
Analyze the shelf image and identify all visible products. My brand is "ABC Foods".
ABC Foods Complete Product Catalog (includes Placement guidelines): {!$Apex:ProductCatalogService.productDetails}
Return the analysis as a JSON object with the following EXACT structure:
{ "products": { "abcFoods": { "present": [ { "productName": "Exact product name from catalog", "category": "Salty Snacks|Sweet Snacks|Confectionery|Biscuits|Premium Range|Health Bars|Kids Range", "quantity": 0, "shelfPosition": "Position description", "placementStatus": "Correct|Needs Attention" } ], "missing": [ { "productName": "Product name from catalog not found on shelf", "category": "Salty Snacks|Sweet Snacks|Confectionery|Biscuits|Premium Range|Health Bars|Kids Range" } ] }, "competitors": [ { "productName": "Product name", "brand": "Brand name", "category": "Derived category from product name/type", "quantity": 0, "shelfPosition": "Position description" } ], "otherProducts": [ { "productName": "Product name", "brand": "Brand name", "category": "Derived category from product name/type", "quantity": 0, "shelfPosition": "Position description" } ] }, "shelfShare": { "abcFoods": { "percentage": 0, "totalProducts": 0, "presentCount": 0, "missingCount": 0, "description": "Description of ABC Foods presence" }, "competitors": { "percentage": 0, "totalProducts": 0, "description": "Description of competitor presence in ABC Foods categories" }, "otherProducts": { "percentage": 0, "totalProducts": 0, "description": "Description of other products not in ABC Foods categories" } } }
Instructions: 1. Compare detected ABC Foods products against the complete catalog above
2. CATEGORY CLASSIFICATION RULES:
A. FOR ABC FOODS PRODUCTS (present and missing): MANDATORY: Classify EVERY ABC Foods product into EXACTLY one of these seven categories: - Salty Snacks: Chips, crisps, puffs, savory mix varieties, salted items, popcorn (savory) - Sweet Snacks: Sweet popcorn, sweet mix varieties, sweet-flavored items - Confectionery: Chocolates, chocolate bars, bites, wafers, gummies, jellies, toffees, chews, mints, candies, buttons - Biscuits: Cookies, biscuits, cream sandwiches, wafers (non-chocolate) - Premium Range: Gift boxes, assortments, executive selections, luxury collections, gourmet items - Health Bars: Protein bars, energy bars, granola bars, nutri-grain bars - Kids Range: Rainbow pops, jelly bears, character-themed items, kids-specific products
B. FOR NON-ABC FOODS PRODUCTS - CATEGORIZE INTO TWO GROUPS:
i. COMPETITORS (ONLY products that compete directly with ABC Foods): - ABC Foods is a packaged foods company specializing in SNACKS and SWEETS only - ONLY include: Chips, crisps, puffs, pretzels, popcorn, chocolates, candy bars, gummies, jellies, toffees, cookies, biscuits, wafers, protein/energy bars (packaged snack bars), kids snack products - Examples: Lays chips, Pringles, Doritos, Snickers, Cadbury, Hershey's, Twix, M&Ms, Oreo, Britannia cookies, Quest bars, Clif bars, KitKat, Skittles, Mentos - Derive descriptive category from product name (e.g., "Potato Chips", "Chocolate Bar", "Candy", "Cookie", "Wafer", "Snack Bar") - EXCLUDE ALL: Beverages (soft drinks, juices, water, milk, tea, coffee, energy drinks), Cereals (corn flakes, muesli, oats), Spreads (peanut butter, jam, Nutella), Bread, Dairy products, Fresh foods, Household items
ii. OTHER PRODUCTS (products that do NOT compete with ABC Foods): - Products that are NOT packaged snacks or sweets - MUST include: ALL beverages/drinks (Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, Sprite, Fanta, Frooti, Real juice, Tropicana, Maaza, water, milk, tea, coffee, Red Bull, Monster, Gatorade) - MUST include: ALL cereals (Kellogg's Corn Flakes, Chocos, Muesli, Oats, breakfast cereals) - MUST include: Spreads (peanut butter, Nutella, jam, Pintola), Bread, Dairy (yogurt, cheese), Fresh items, Frozen foods, Household items, Non-food - Derive descriptive category from product name (e.g., "Soft Drink", "Juice", "Water", "Cereal", "Spread", "Bread", "Milk")
3. List ABC Foods products found on shelf in "present" array - MUST include: productName, category, quantity, shelfPosition, placementStatus 4. List ABC Foods products NOT found on shelf in "missing" array - MUST include: productName, category 5. Identify COMPETITOR products (matching ABC Foods categories) - MUST include: productName, brand, category (derived from product name), quantity, shelfPosition 6. Identify OTHER products (NOT matching ABC Foods categories) - MUST include: productName, brand, category (derived from product name), quantity, shelfPosition 7. Calculate shelf share percentage for ABC Foods: (ABC Foods present products / total products on shelf) * 100 8. Calculate shelf share percentage for competitors: (competitor products / total products on shelf) * 100 9. Calculate shelf share percentage for other products: (other products / total products on shelf) * 100 10. Provide shelf position information (top shelf, middle shelf, bottom shelf, left, center, right) 11. Include presentCount and missingCount in abcFoods shelfShare 12. PLACEMENT VALIDATION (ABC Foods products only): - Each ABC Foods product in the catalog includes a recommended Placement (e.g., "Top Shelf", "Eye Level", "Bottom Shelf", "Checkout Aisle") - For every ABC Foods product found in the "present" array, compare its detected shelfPosition against the Placement value from the catalog - Set placementStatus to "Correct" if the detected shelfPosition matches or is consistent with the catalog Placement guideline - Set placementStatus to "Needs Attention" if the detected shelfPosition does not match the catalog Placement guideline - Do NOT add placementStatus to competitors or otherProducts 13. Return ONLY the JSON structure, no additional text or explanation
CRITICAL: - ABC Foods products (present and missing): Category MUST be EXACTLY one of these seven values: "Salty Snacks", "Sweet Snacks", "Confectionery", "Biscuits", "Premium Range", "Health Bars", or "Kids Range". Use exact category names (case-sensitive). Never use any other value for ABC Foods products.
- COMPETITOR products: ABC Foods specializes in SNACKS and SWEETS only. ONLY include packaged snack and sweet products. * INCLUDE ONLY: Chips (Lays, Pringles, Doritos), Chocolates (Snickers, Cadbury, KitKat), Cookies (Oreo, Britannia), Candies (Mentos, Skittles, Eclairs), Biscuits (Parle-G, Good Day), Snack Bars (Quest, Clif) * EXCLUDE ALL: - Beverages: Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, Sprite, Fanta, Mountain Dew, 7Up - Juices: Frooti, Real, Tropicana, Maaza, Slice, Appy Fizz - Cereals: Kellogg's Corn Flakes, Chocos, Muesli, Oats, any breakfast cereal - Spreads: Pintola, Nutella, peanut butter, jam - Dairy: Milk, yogurt, cheese - Others: Bread, fresh foods, household items
- OTHER PRODUCTS: MUST include ALL non-snack/sweet products. * JUICES GO HERE: Frooti, Real, Tropicana, Maaza, Slice, Appy Fizz, any packaged juice → category "Juice" * CEREALS GO HERE: Kellogg's Corn Flakes, Chocos, Muesli, Oats → category "Cereal" * BEVERAGES GO HERE: Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, Sprite, Fanta, 7Up, Mirinda, Mountain Dew → category "Soft Drink" * SPREADS GO HERE: Pintola, Nutella, peanut butter, jam → category "Spread" * OTHERS: Bread, dairy, fresh items, frozen foods, household items, non-food
- MANDATORY RULES: * Frooti, Real, Tropicana, Maaza, any juice → otherProducts with category "Juice", NEVER competitors * Kellogg's, Chocos, any cereal → otherProducts with category "Cereal", NEVER competitors * Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, any beverage → otherProducts with category "Soft Drink", NEVER competitors * Pintola, peanut butter, any spread → otherProducts with category "Spread", NEVER competitors
- Never omit the category field for any product. - Ensure all numeric values are accurate and the sum of ABC Foods, competitors, and other products percentages equals 100%. - Match ABC Foods product names exactly as they appear in the catalog. - placementStatus is ONLY applicable to ABC Foods present products. Never add it to competitors or otherProducts.

templateDataProviders.description: Retrieves all active products available in the system
templateDataProviders.label: Get Products

templateVersions.content:
Read the {!$Input:ContentDocumentID.Id} and perform OCR to analyze the shelf display.
Analyze the shelf image and identify all visible products. My brand is "ABC Foods".
ABC Foods Complete Product Catalog (includes Placement guidelines): {!$Apex:ProductCatalogService.productDetails}
Return the analysis as a JSON object with the following EXACT structure:
{ "products": { "abcFoods": { "present": [ { "productName": "Exact product name from catalog", "category": "Salty Snacks|Sweet Snacks|Confectionery|Biscuits|Premium Range|Health Bars|Kids Range", "quantity": 0, "shelfPosition": "Position description", "placementStatus": "Correct|Needs Attention" } ], "missing": [ { "productName": "Product name from catalog not found on shelf", "category": "Salty Snacks|Sweet Snacks|Confectionery|Biscuits|Premium Range|Health Bars|Kids Range" } ] }, "competitors": [ { "productName": "Product name", "brand": "Brand name", "category": "Derived category from product name/type", "quantity": 0, "shelfPosition": "Position description" } ], "otherProducts": [ { "productName": "Product name", "brand": "Brand name", "category": "Derived category from product name/type", "quantity": 0, "shelfPosition": "Position description" } ] }, "shelfShare": { "abcFoods": { "percentage": 0, "totalProducts": 0, "presentCount": 0, "missingCount": 0, "description": "Description of ABC Foods presence" }, "competitors": { "percentage": 0, "totalProducts": 0, "description": "Description of competitor presence in ABC Foods categories" }, "otherProducts": { "percentage": 0, "totalProducts": 0, "description": "Description of other products not in ABC Foods categories" } } }
Instructions: 1. Compare detected ABC Foods products against the complete catalog above
2. CATEGORY CLASSIFICATION RULES:
A. FOR ABC FOODS PRODUCTS (present and missing): MANDATORY: Classify EVERY ABC Foods product into EXACTLY one of these seven categories: - Salty Snacks: Chips, crisps, puffs, savory mix varieties, salted items, popcorn (savory) - Sweet Snacks: Sweet popcorn, sweet mix varieties, sweet-flavored items - Confectionery: Chocolates, chocolate bars, bites, wafers, gummies, jellies, toffees, chews, mints, candies, buttons - Biscuits: Cookies, biscuits, cream sandwiches, wafers (non-chocolate) - Premium Range: Gift boxes, assortments, executive selections, luxury collections, gourmet items - Health Bars: Protein bars, energy bars, granola bars, nutri-grain bars - Kids Range: Rainbow pops, jelly bears, character-themed items, kids-specific products
B. FOR NON-ABC FOODS PRODUCTS - CATEGORIZE INTO TWO GROUPS:
i. COMPETITORS (ONLY products that compete directly with ABC Foods): - ABC Foods is a packaged foods company specializing in SNACKS and SWEETS only - ONLY include: Chips, crisps, puffs, pretzels, popcorn, chocolates, candy bars, gummies, jellies, toffees, cookies, biscuits, wafers, protein/energy bars (packaged snack bars), kids snack products - Examples: Lays chips, Pringles, Doritos, Snickers, Cadbury, Hershey's, Twix, M&Ms, Oreo, Britannia cookies, Quest bars, Clif bars, KitKat, Skittles, Mentos - Derive descriptive category from product name (e.g., "Potato Chips", "Chocolate Bar", "Candy", "Cookie", "Wafer", "Snack Bar") - EXCLUDE ALL: Beverages (soft drinks, juices, water, milk, tea, coffee, energy drinks), Cereals (corn flakes, muesli, oats), Spreads (peanut butter, jam, Nutella), Bread, Dairy products, Fresh foods, Household items
ii. OTHER PRODUCTS (products that do NOT compete with ABC Foods): - Products that are NOT packaged snacks or sweets - MUST include: ALL beverages/drinks (Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, Sprite, Fanta, Frooti, Real juice, Tropicana, Maaza, water, milk, tea, coffee, Red Bull, Monster, Gatorade) - MUST include: ALL cereals (Kellogg's Corn Flakes, Chocos, Muesli, Oats, breakfast cereals) - MUST include: Spreads (peanut butter, Nutella, jam, Pintola), Bread, Dairy (yogurt, cheese), Fresh items, Frozen foods, Household items, Non-food - Derive descriptive category from product name (e.g., "Soft Drink", "Juice", "Water", "Cereal", "Spread", "Bread", "Milk")
3. List ABC Foods products found on shelf in "present" array - MUST include: productName, category, quantity, shelfPosition, placementStatus 4. List ABC Foods products NOT found on shelf in "missing" array - MUST include: productName, category 5. Identify COMPETITOR products (matching ABC Foods categories) - MUST include: productName, brand, category (derived from product name), quantity, shelfPosition 6. Identify OTHER products (NOT matching ABC Foods categories) - MUST include: productName, brand, category (derived from product name), quantity, shelfPosition 7. Calculate shelf share percentage for ABC Foods: (ABC Foods present products / total products on shelf) * 100 8. Calculate shelf share percentage for competitors: (competitor products / total products on shelf) * 100 9. Calculate shelf share percentage for other products: (other products / total products on shelf) * 100 10. Provide shelf position information (top shelf, middle shelf, bottom shelf, left, center, right) 11. Include presentCount and missingCount in abcFoods shelfShare 12. PLACEMENT VALIDATION (ABC Foods products only): - Each ABC Foods product in the catalog includes a recommended Placement (e.g., "Top Shelf", "Eye Level", "Bottom Shelf", "Checkout Aisle") - For every ABC Foods product found in the "present" array, compare its detected shelfPosition against the Placement value from the catalog - Set placementStatus to "Correct" if the detected shelfPosition matches or is consistent with the catalog Placement guideline - Set placementStatus to "Needs Attention" if the detected shelfPosition does not match the catalog Placement guideline - Do NOT add placementStatus to competitors or otherProducts 13. Return ONLY the JSON structure, no additional text or explanation
CRITICAL: - ABC Foods products (present and missing): Category MUST be EXACTLY one of these seven values: "Salty Snacks", "Sweet Snacks", "Confectionery", "Biscuits", "Premium Range", "Health Bars", or "Kids Range". Use exact category names (case-sensitive). Never use any other value for ABC Foods products.
- COMPETITOR products: ABC Foods specializes in SNACKS and SWEETS only. ONLY include packaged snack and sweet products. * INCLUDE ONLY: Chips (Lays, Pringles, Doritos), Chocolates (Snickers, Cadbury, KitKat), Cookies (Oreo, Britannia), Candies (Mentos, Skittles, Eclairs), Biscuits (Parle-G, Good Day), Snack Bars (Quest, Clif) * EXCLUDE ALL: - Beverages: Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, Sprite, Fanta, Mountain Dew, 7Up - Juices: Frooti, Real, Tropicana, Maaza, Slice, Appy Fizz - Cereals: Kellogg's Corn Flakes, Chocos, Muesli, Oats, any breakfast cereal - Spreads: Pintola, Nutella, peanut butter, jam - Dairy: Milk, yogurt, cheese - Others: Bread, fresh foods, household items
- OTHER PRODUCTS: MUST include ALL non-snack/sweet products. * JUICES GO HERE: Frooti, Real, Tropicana, Maaza, Slice, Appy Fizz, any packaged juice → category "Juice" * CEREALS GO HERE: Kellogg's Corn Flakes, Chocos, Muesli, Oats → category "Cereal" * BEVERAGES GO HERE: Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, Sprite, Fanta, 7Up, Mirinda, Mountain Dew → category "Soft Drink" * SPREADS GO HERE: Pintola, Nutella, peanut butter, jam → category "Spread" * OTHERS: Bread, dairy, fresh items, frozen foods, household items, non-food
- MANDATORY RULES: * Frooti, Real, Tropicana, Maaza, any juice → otherProducts with category "Juice", NEVER competitors * Kellogg's, Chocos, any cereal → otherProducts with category "Cereal", NEVER competitors * Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, any beverage → otherProducts with category "Soft Drink", NEVER competitors * Pintola, peanut butter, any spread → otherProducts with category "Spread", NEVER competitors
- Never omit the category field for any product. - Ensure all numeric values are accurate and the sum of ABC Foods, competitors, and other products percentages equals 100%. - Match ABC Foods product names exactly as they appear in the catalog. - placementStatus is ONLY applicable to ABC Foods present products. Never add it to competitors or otherProducts.

templateDataProviders.description: Retrieves all active products available in the system
templateDataProviders.label: Get Products

templateVersions.content:
Read the {!$Input:ContentDocumentID.Id} and perform OCR to analyze the shelf display.
Analyze the shelf image and identify all visible products. My brand is "ABC Foods".
ABC Foods Complete Product Catalog (includes Placement guidelines): {!$Apex:ProductCatalogService.productDetails}
Return the analysis as a JSON object with the following EXACT structure:
{ "products": { "abcFoods": { "present": [ { "productName": "Exact product name from catalog", "category": "Salty Snacks|Sweet Snacks|Confectionery|Biscuits|Premium Range|Health Bars|Kids Range", "quantity": 0, "shelfPosition": "Position description", "placementStatus": "Correct|Needs Attention" } ], "missing": [ { "productName": "Product name from catalog not found on shelf", "category": "Salty Snacks|Sweet Snacks|Confectionery|Biscuits|Premium Range|Health Bars|Kids Range" } ] }, "competitors": [ { "productName": "Product name", "brand": "Brand name", "category": "Derived category from product name/type", "quantity": 0, "shelfPosition": "Position description" } ], "otherProducts": [ { "productName": "Product name", "brand": "Brand name", "category": "Derived category from product name/type", "quantity": 0, "shelfPosition": "Position description" } ] }, "shelfShare": { "abcFoods": { "percentage": 0, "totalProducts": 0, "presentCount": 0, "missingCount": 0, "description": "Description of ABC Foods presence" }, "competitors": { "percentage": 0, "totalProducts": 0, "description": "Description of competitor presence in ABC Foods categories" }, "otherProducts": { "percentage": 0, "totalProducts": 0, "description": "Description of other products not in ABC Foods categories" } } }
Instructions: 1. Compare detected ABC Foods products against the complete catalog above
2. CATEGORY CLASSIFICATION RULES:
A. FOR ABC FOODS PRODUCTS (present and missing): MANDATORY: Classify EVERY ABC Foods product into EXACTLY one of these seven categories: - Salty Snacks: Chips, crisps, puffs, savory mix varieties, salted items, popcorn (savory) - Sweet Snacks: Sweet popcorn, sweet mix varieties, sweet-flavored items - Confectionery: Chocolates, chocolate bars, bites, wafers, gummies, jellies, toffees, chews, mints, candies, buttons - Biscuits: Cookies, biscuits, cream sandwiches, wafers (non-chocolate) - Premium Range: Gift boxes, assortments, executive selections, luxury collections, gourmet items - Health Bars: Protein bars, energy bars, granola bars, nutri-grain bars - Kids Range: Rainbow pops, jelly bears, character-themed items, kids-specific products
B. FOR NON-ABC FOODS PRODUCTS - CATEGORIZE INTO TWO GROUPS:
i. COMPETITORS (ONLY products that compete directly with ABC Foods): - ABC Foods is a packaged foods company specializing in SNACKS and SWEETS only - ONLY include: Chips, crisps, puffs, pretzels, popcorn, chocolates, candy bars, gummies, jellies, toffees, cookies, biscuits, wafers, protein/energy bars (packaged snack bars), kids snack products - Examples: Lays chips, Pringles, Doritos, Snickers, Cadbury, Hershey's, Twix, M&Ms, Oreo, Britannia cookies, Quest bars, Clif bars, KitKat, Skittles, Mentos - Derive descriptive category from product name (e.g., "Potato Chips", "Chocolate Bar", "Candy", "Cookie", "Wafer", "Snack Bar") - EXCLUDE ALL: Beverages (soft drinks, juices, water, milk, tea, coffee, energy drinks), Cereals (corn flakes, muesli, oats), Spreads (peanut butter, jam, Nutella), Bread, Dairy products, Fresh foods, Household items
ii. OTHER PRODUCTS (products that do NOT compete with ABC Foods): - Products that are NOT packaged snacks or sweets - MUST include: ALL beverages/drinks (Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, Sprite, Fanta, Frooti, Real juice, Tropicana, Maaza, water, milk, tea, coffee, Red Bull, Monster, Gatorade) - MUST include: ALL cereals (Kellogg's Corn Flakes, Chocos, Muesli, Oats, breakfast cereals) - MUST include: Spreads (peanut butter, Nutella, jam, Pintola), Bread, Dairy (yogurt, cheese), Fresh items, Frozen foods, Household items, Non-food - Derive descriptive category from product name (e.g., "Soft Drink", "Juice", "Water", "Cereal", "Spread", "Bread", "Milk")
3. List ABC Foods products found on shelf in "present" array - MUST include: productName, category, quantity, shelfPosition, placementStatus 4. List ABC Foods products NOT found on shelf in "missing" array - MUST include: productName, category 5. Identify COMPETITOR products (matching ABC Foods categories) - MUST include: productName, brand, category (derived from product name), quantity, shelfPosition 6. Identify OTHER products (NOT matching ABC Foods categories) - MUST include: productName, brand, category (derived from product name), quantity, shelfPosition 7. Calculate shelf share percentage for ABC Foods: (ABC Foods present products / total products on shelf) * 100 8. Calculate shelf share percentage for competitors: (competitor products / total products on shelf) * 100 9. Calculate shelf share percentage for other products: (other products / total products on shelf) * 100 10. Provide shelf position information (top shelf, middle shelf, bottom shelf, left, center, right) 11. Include presentCount and missingCount in abcFoods shelfShare 12. PLACEMENT VALIDATION (ABC Foods products only): - Each ABC Foods product in the catalog includes a recommended Placement (e.g., "Top Shelf", "Eye Level", "Bottom Shelf", "Checkout Aisle") - For every ABC Foods product found in the "present" array, compare its detected shelfPosition against the Placement value from the catalog - Set placementStatus to "Correct" if the detected shelfPosition matches or is consistent with the catalog Placement guideline - Set placementStatus to "Needs Attention" if the detected shelfPosition does not match the catalog Placement guideline - Do NOT add placementStatus to competitors or otherProducts 13. Return ONLY the JSON structure, no additional text or explanation
CRITICAL: - ABC Foods products (present and missing): Category MUST be EXACTLY one of these seven values: "Salty Snacks", "Sweet Snacks", "Confectionery", "Biscuits", "Premium Range", "Health Bars", or "Kids Range". Use exact category names (case-sensitive). Never use any other value for ABC Foods products.
- COMPETITOR products: ABC Foods specializes in SNACKS and SWEETS only. ONLY include packaged snack and sweet products. * INCLUDE ONLY: Chips (Lays, Pringles, Doritos), Chocolates (Snickers, Cadbury, KitKat), Cookies (Oreo, Britannia), Candies (Mentos, Skittles, Eclairs), Biscuits (Parle-G, Good Day), Snack Bars (Quest, Clif) * EXCLUDE ALL: - Beverages: Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, Sprite, Fanta, Mountain Dew, 7Up - Juices: Frooti, Real, Tropicana, Maaza, Slice, Appy Fizz - Cereals: Kellogg's Corn Flakes, Chocos, Muesli, Oats, any breakfast cereal - Spreads: Pintola, Nutella, peanut butter, jam - Dairy: Milk, yogurt, cheese - Others: Bread, fresh foods, household items
- OTHER PRODUCTS: MUST include ALL non-snack/sweet products. * JUICES GO HERE: Frooti, Real, Tropicana, Maaza, Slice, Appy Fizz, any packaged juice → category "Juice" * CEREALS GO HERE: Kellogg's Corn Flakes, Chocos, Muesli, Oats → category "Cereal" * BEVERAGES GO HERE: Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, Sprite, Fanta, 7Up, Mirinda, Mountain Dew → category "Soft Drink" * SPREADS GO HERE: Pintola, Nutella, peanut butter, jam → category "Spread" * OTHERS: Bread, dairy, fresh items, frozen foods, household items, non-food
- MANDATORY RULES: * Frooti, Real, Tropicana, Maaza, any juice → otherProducts with category "Juice", NEVER competitors * Kellogg's, Chocos, any cereal → otherProducts with category "Cereal", NEVER competitors * Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, any beverage → otherProducts with category "Soft Drink", NEVER competitors * Pintola, peanut butter, any spread → otherProducts with category "Spread", NEVER competitors
- Never omit the category field for any product. - Ensure all numeric values are accurate and the sum of ABC Foods, competitors, and other products percentages equals 100%. - Match ABC Foods product names exactly as they appear in the catalog. - placementStatus is ONLY applicable to ABC Foods present products. Never add it to competitors or otherProducts.

templateDataProviders.description: Retrieves all active products available in the system
templateDataProviders.label: Get Products

templateVersions.content:
Read the {!$Input:ContentDocumentID.Id} and perform OCR to analyze the shelf display.
Analyze the shelf image and identify all visible products. My brand is "ABC Foods".
ABC Foods Complete Product Catalog (includes Placement guidelines): {!$Apex:ProductCatalogService.productDetails}
Return the analysis as a JSON object with the following EXACT structure:
{ "products": { "abcFoods": { "present": [ { "productName": "Exact product name from catalog", "category": "Salty Snacks|Sweet Snacks|Confectionery|Biscuits|Premium Range|Health Bars|Kids Range", "quantity": 0, "shelfPosition": "Position description", "placementStatus": "Correct|Needs Attention" } ], "missing": [ { "productName": "Product name from catalog not found on shelf", "category": "Salty Snacks|Sweet Snacks|Confectionery|Biscuits|Premium Range|Health Bars|Kids Range" } ] }, "competitors": [ { "productName": "Product name", "brand": "Brand name", "category": "Derived category from product name/type", "quantity": 0, "shelfPosition": "Position description" } ], "otherProducts": [ { "productName": "Product name", "brand": "Brand name", "category": "Derived category from product name/type", "quantity": 0, "shelfPosition": "Position description" } ] }, "shelfShare": { "abcFoods": { "percentage": 0, "totalProducts": 0, "presentCount": 0, "missingCount": 0, "description": "Description of ABC Foods presence" }, "competitors": { "percentage": 0, "totalProducts": 0, "description": "Description of competitor presence in ABC Foods categories" }, "otherProducts": { "percentage": 0, "totalProducts": 0, "description": "Description of other products not in ABC Foods categories" } } }
Instructions: 1. Compare detected ABC Foods products against the complete catalog above
2. CATEGORY CLASSIFICATION RULES:
A. FOR ABC FOODS PRODUCTS (present and missing): MANDATORY: Classify EVERY ABC Foods product into EXACTLY one of these seven categories: - Salty Snacks: Chips, crisps, puffs, savory mix varieties, salted items, popcorn (savory) - Sweet Snacks: Sweet popcorn, sweet mix varieties, sweet-flavored items - Confectionery: Chocolates, chocolate bars, bites, wafers, gummies, jellies, toffees, chews, mints, candies, buttons - Biscuits: Cookies, biscuits, cream sandwiches, wafers (non-chocolate) - Premium Range: Gift boxes, assortments, executive selections, luxury collections, gourmet items - Health Bars: Protein bars, energy bars, granola bars, nutri-grain bars - Kids Range: Rainbow pops, jelly bears, character-themed items, kids-specific products
B. FOR NON-ABC FOODS PRODUCTS - CATEGORIZE INTO TWO GROUPS:
i. COMPETITORS (ONLY products that compete directly with ABC Foods): - ABC Foods is a packaged foods company specializing in SNACKS and SWEETS only - ONLY include: Chips, crisps, puffs, pretzels, popcorn, chocolates, candy bars, gummies, jellies, toffees, cookies, biscuits, wafers, protein/energy bars (packaged snack bars), kids snack products - Examples: Lays chips, Pringles, Doritos, Snickers, Cadbury, Hershey's, Twix, M&Ms, Oreo, Britannia cookies, Quest bars, Clif bars, KitKat, Skittles, Mentos - Derive descriptive category from product name (e.g., "Potato Chips", "Chocolate Bar", "Candy", "Cookie", "Wafer", "Snack Bar") - EXCLUDE ALL: Beverages (soft drinks, juices, water, milk, tea, coffee, energy drinks), Cereals (corn flakes, muesli, oats), Spreads (peanut butter, jam, Nutella), Bread, Dairy products, Fresh foods, Household items
ii. OTHER PRODUCTS (products that do NOT compete with ABC Foods): - Products that are NOT packaged snacks or sweets - MUST include: ALL beverages/drinks (Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, Sprite, Fanta, Frooti, Real juice, Tropicana, Maaza, water, milk, tea, coffee, Red Bull, Monster, Gatorade) - MUST include: ALL cereals (Kellogg's Corn Flakes, Chocos, Muesli, Oats, breakfast cereals) - MUST include: Spreads (peanut butter, Nutella, jam, Pintola), Bread, Dairy (yogurt, cheese), Fresh items, Frozen foods, Household items, Non-food - Derive descriptive category from product name (e.g., "Soft Drink", "Juice", "Water", "Cereal", "Spread", "Bread", "Milk")
3. List ABC Foods products found on shelf in "present" array - MUST include: productName, category, quantity, shelfPosition, placementStatus 4. List ABC Foods products NOT found on shelf in "missing" array - MUST include: productName, category 5. Identify COMPETITOR products (matching ABC Foods categories) - MUST include: productName, brand, category (derived from product name), quantity, shelfPosition 6. Identify OTHER products (NOT matching ABC Foods categories) - MUST include: productName, brand, category (derived from product name), quantity, shelfPosition 7. Calculate shelf share percentage for ABC Foods: (ABC Foods present products / total products on shelf) * 100 8. Calculate shelf share percentage for competitors: (competitor products / total products on shelf) * 100 9. Calculate shelf share percentage for other products: (other products / total products on shelf) * 100 10. Provide shelf position information (top shelf, middle shelf, bottom shelf, left, center, right) 11. Include presentCount and missingCount in abcFoods shelfShare 12. PLACEMENT VALIDATION (ABC Foods products only): - Each ABC Foods product in the catalog includes a recommended Placement (e.g., "Top Shelf", "Eye Level", "Bottom Shelf", "Checkout Aisle") - For every ABC Foods product found in the "present" array, compare its detected shelfPosition against the Placement value from the catalog - Set placementStatus to "Correct" if the detected shelfPosition matches or is consistent with the catalog Placement guideline - Set placementStatus to "Needs Attention" if the detected shelfPosition does not match the catalog Placement guideline - Do NOT add placementStatus to competitors or otherProducts 13. Return ONLY the JSON structure, no additional text or explanation
CRITICAL: - ABC Foods products (present and missing): Category MUST be EXACTLY one of these seven values: "Salty Snacks", "Sweet Snacks", "Confectionery", "Biscuits", "Premium Range", "Health Bars", or "Kids Range". Use exact category names (case-sensitive). Never use any other value for ABC Foods products.
- COMPETITOR products: ABC Foods specializes in SNACKS and SWEETS only. ONLY include packaged snack and sweet products. * INCLUDE ONLY: Chips (Lays, Pringles, Doritos), Chocolates (Snickers, Cadbury, KitKat), Cookies (Oreo, Britannia), Candies (Mentos, Skittles, Eclairs), Biscuits (Parle-G, Good Day), Snack Bars (Quest, Clif) * EXCLUDE ALL: - Beverages: Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, Sprite, Fanta, Mountain Dew, 7Up - Juices: Frooti, Real, Tropicana, Maaza, Slice, Appy Fizz - Cereals: Kellogg's Corn Flakes, Chocos, Muesli, Oats, any breakfast cereal - Spreads: Pintola, Nutella, peanut butter, jam - Dairy: Milk, yogurt, cheese - Others: Bread, fresh foods, household items
- OTHER PRODUCTS: MUST include ALL non-snack/sweet products. * JUICES GO HERE: Frooti, Real, Tropicana, Maaza, Slice, Appy Fizz, any packaged juice → category "Juice" * CEREALS GO HERE: Kellogg's Corn Flakes, Chocos, Muesli, Oats → category "Cereal" * BEVERAGES GO HERE: Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, Sprite, Fanta, 7Up, Mirinda, Mountain Dew → category "Soft Drink" * SPREADS GO HERE: Pintola, Nutella, peanut butter, jam → category "Spread" * OTHERS: Bread, dairy, fresh items, frozen foods, household items, non-food
- MANDATORY RULES: * Frooti, Real, Tropicana, Maaza, any juice → otherProducts with category "Juice", NEVER competitors * Kellogg's, Chocos, any cereal → otherProducts with category "Cereal", NEVER competitors * Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, any beverage → otherProducts with category "Soft Drink", NEVER competitors * Pintola, peanut butter, any spread → otherProducts with category "Spread", NEVER competitors
- Never omit the category field for any product. - Ensure all numeric values are accurate and the sum of ABC Foods, competitors, and other products percentages equals 100%. - Match ABC Foods product names exactly as they appear in the catalog. - placementStatus is ONLY applicable to ABC Foods present products. Never add it to competitors or otherProducts.

templateDataProviders.description: Retrieves all active products available in the system
templateDataProviders.label: Get Products

templateVersions.content:
Read the {!$Input:ContentDocumentID.Id} and perform OCR to analyze the shelf display.
Analyze the shelf image and identify all visible products. My brand is "ABC Foods".
ABC Foods Complete Product Catalog (includes Placement guidelines and Store Quantity): {!$Apex:ProductCatalogService.productDetails}
Return the analysis as a JSON object with the following EXACT structure:
{ "products": { "abcFoods": { "present": [ { "productName": "Exact product name from catalog", "category": "Salty Snacks|Sweet Snacks|Confectionery|Biscuits|Premium Range|Health Bars|Kids Range", "quantity": 0, "shelfPosition": "Position description", "placementStatus": "Correct|Needs Attention", "storeQuantity": 0, "alertType": "LOW_STOCK|STOCKED", "message": "Store quantity is below 50|Stocked" } ], "missing": [ { "productName": "Product name from catalog not found on shelf", "category": "Salty Snacks|Sweet Snacks|Confectionery|Biscuits|Premium Range|Health Bars|Kids Range" } ] }, "competitors": [ { "productName": "Product name", "brand": "Brand name", "category": "Derived category from product name/type", "quantity": 0, "shelfPosition": "Position description" } ], "otherProducts": [ { "productName": "Product name", "brand": "Brand name", "category": "Derived category from product name/type", "quantity": 0, "shelfPosition": "Position description" } ] }, "shelfShare": { "abcFoods": { "percentage": 0, "totalProducts": 0, "presentCount": 0, "missingCount": 0, "description": "Description of ABC Foods presence" }, "competitors": { "percentage": 0, "totalProducts": 0, "description": "Description of competitor presence in ABC Foods categories" }, "otherProducts": { "percentage": 0, "totalProducts": 0, "description": "Description of other products not in ABC Foods categories" } } }
Instructions: 1. Compare detected ABC Foods products against the complete catalog above.
2. IMPORTANT QUANTITY VS STORE QUANTITY RULE: - The catalog contains a Store Quantity value for each ABC Foods product. - That Store Quantity value comes from StoreProduct.Quantity__c. - In the JSON response: - quantity = observed count seen in the shelf image - storeQuantity = Store Quantity value from the ABC Foods catalog for that exact product - Never copy storeQuantity into quantity. - storeQuantity must come from the catalog entry for that exact ABC Foods product.
3. CATEGORY CLASSIFICATION RULES:
A. FOR ABC FOODS PRODUCTS (present and missing): MANDATORY: Classify EVERY ABC Foods product into EXACTLY one of these seven categories: - Salty Snacks: Chips, crisps, puffs, savory mix varieties, salted items, popcorn (savory) - Sweet Snacks: Sweet popcorn, sweet mix varieties, sweet-flavored items - Confectionery: Chocolates, chocolate bars, bites, wafers, gummies, jellies, toffees, chews, mints, candies, buttons - Biscuits: Cookies, biscuits, cream sandwiches, wafers (non-chocolate) - Premium Range: Gift boxes, assortments, executive selections, luxury collections, gourmet items - Health Bars: Protein bars, energy bars, granola bars, nutri-grain bars - Kids Range: Rainbow pops, jelly bears, character-themed items, kids-specific products
B. FOR NON-ABC FOODS PRODUCTS - CATEGORIZE INTO TWO GROUPS:
i. COMPETITORS (ONLY products that compete directly with ABC Foods): - ABC Foods is a packaged foods company specializing in SNACKS and SWEETS only - ONLY include: Chips, crisps, puffs, pretzels, popcorn, chocolates, candy bars, gummies, jellies, toffees, cookies, biscuits, wafers, protein/energy bars (packaged snack bars), kids snack products - Examples: Lays chips, Pringles, Doritos, Snickers, Cadbury, Hershey's, Twix, M&Ms, Oreo, Britannia cookies, Quest bars, Clif bars, KitKat, Skittles, Mentos - Derive descriptive category from product name (e.g., Potato Chips, Chocolate Bar, Candy, Cookie, Wafer, Snack Bar) - EXCLUDE ALL: Beverages (soft drinks, juices, water, milk, tea, coffee, energy drinks), Cereals (corn flakes, muesli, oats), Spreads (peanut butter, jam, Nutella), Bread, Dairy products, Fresh foods, Household items
ii. OTHER PRODUCTS (products that do NOT compete with ABC Foods): - Products that are NOT packaged snacks or sweets - MUST include: ALL beverages/drinks (Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, Sprite, Fanta, Frooti, Real juice, Tropicana, Maaza, water, milk, tea, coffee, Red Bull, Monster, Gatorade) - MUST include: ALL cereals (Kellogg's Corn Flakes, Chocos, Muesli, Oats, breakfast cereals) - MUST include: Spreads (peanut butter, Nutella, jam, Pintola), Bread, Dairy (yogurt, cheese), Fresh items, Frozen foods, Household items, Non-food - Derive descriptive category from product name (e.g., Soft Drink, Juice, Water, Cereal, Spread, Bread, Milk)
4. List ABC Foods products found on shelf in present array. MUST include: productName, category, quantity, shelfPosition, placementStatus, storeQuantity, alertType, message. 5. List ABC Foods products NOT found on shelf in missing array. MUST include: productName, category. 6. Identify COMPETITOR products (matching ABC Foods categories). MUST include: productName, brand, category (derived from product name), quantity, shelfPosition. 7. Identify OTHER products (NOT matching ABC Foods categories). MUST include: productName, brand, category (derived from product name), quantity, shelfPosition. 8. Calculate shelf share percentage for ABC Foods: (ABC Foods present products / total products on shelf) * 100. 9. Calculate shelf share percentage for competitors: (competitor products / total products on shelf) * 100. 10. Calculate shelf share percentage for other products: (other products / total products on shelf) * 100. 11. Provide shelf position information (top shelf, middle shelf, bottom shelf, left, center, right). 12. Include presentCount and missingCount in abcFoods shelfShare. 13. PLACEMENT VALIDATION (ABC Foods products only): - Each ABC Foods product in the catalog includes a recommended Placement (e.g., Top Shelf, Eye Level, Bottom Shelf, Checkout Aisle). - For every ABC Foods product found in the present array, compare its detected shelfPosition against the Placement value from the catalog. - Set placementStatus to Correct if the detected shelfPosition matches or is consistent with the catalog Placement guideline. - Set placementStatus to Needs Attention if the detected shelfPosition does not match the catalog Placement guideline. - Do NOT add placementStatus to competitors or otherProducts.
14. STOCK ALERT FIELDS FOR ABC FOODS PRESENT PRODUCTS: - For every product in abcFoods.present, always include storeQuantity, alertType, and message. - storeQuantity must be taken from the catalog value for that exact product. - LOW_STOCK must be based only on storeQuantity: - If storeQuantity < 50: - set alertType to LOW_STOCK - set message to Store quantity is below 50 - If storeQuantity >= 50: - set alertType to STOCKED - set message to Stocked
15. Do NOT return a separate stockAlerts node. 16. Return ONLY the JSON structure, no additional text or explanation.
CRITICAL: - ABC Foods products (present and missing): Category MUST be EXACTLY one of these seven values: Salty Snacks, Sweet Snacks, Confectionery, Biscuits, Premium Range, Health Bars, or Kids Range. Use exact category names (case-sensitive). Never use any other value for ABC Foods products.
- COMPETITOR products: ABC Foods specializes in SNACKS and SWEETS only. ONLY include packaged snack and sweet products. * INCLUDE ONLY: Chips (Lays, Pringles, Doritos), Chocolates (Snickers, Cadbury, KitKat), Cookies (Oreo, Britannia), Candies (Mentos, Skittles, Eclairs), Biscuits (Parle-G, Good Day), Snack Bars (Quest, Clif) * EXCLUDE ALL: - Beverages: Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, Sprite, Fanta, Mountain Dew, 7Up - Juices: Frooti, Real, Tropicana, Maaza, Slice, Appy Fizz - Cereals: Kellogg's Corn Flakes, Chocos, Muesli, Oats, any breakfast cereal - Spreads: Pintola, Nutella, peanut butter, jam - Dairy: Milk, yogurt, cheese - Others: Bread, fresh foods, household items
- OTHER PRODUCTS: MUST include ALL non-snack/sweet products. * JUICES GO HERE: Frooti, Real, Tropicana, Maaza, Slice, Appy Fizz, any packaged juice -> category Juice * CEREALS GO HERE: Kellogg's Corn Flakes, Chocos, Muesli, Oats -> category Cereal * BEVERAGES GO HERE: Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, Sprite, Fanta, 7Up, Mirinda, Mountain Dew -> category Soft Drink * SPREADS GO HERE: Pintola, Nutella, peanut butter, jam -> category Spread * OTHERS: Bread, dairy, fresh items, frozen foods, household items, non-food
- MANDATORY RULES: * Frooti, Real, Tropicana, Maaza, any juice -> otherProducts with category Juice, NEVER competitors * Kellogg's, Chocos, any cereal -> otherProducts with category Cereal, NEVER competitors * Pepsi, Coke, Thumbs Up, any beverage -> otherProducts with category Soft Drink, NEVER competitors * Pintola, peanut butter, any spread -> otherProducts with category Spread, NEVER competitors
- Never omit the category field for any product. - Include quantity for every found product in abcFoods.present, competitors, and otherProducts. - Ensure all numeric values are accurate and the sum of ABC Foods, competitors, and other products percentages equals 100%. - Match ABC Foods product names exactly as they appear in the catalog. - placementStatus is ONLY applicable to ABC Foods present products. Never add it to competitors or otherProducts. - storeQuantity, alertType, and message are ONLY applicable to abcFoods.present products. Never add them to competitors, otherProducts, or missing products. - LOW_STOCK decision must use only this condition: storeQuantity < 50.

templateDataProviders.description: Retrieves all active products available in the system
templateDataProviders.label: Get Products
